---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, a new DLP pattern, or a new integration.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is the user, and what
were they trying to do when they hit the limitation?

## Proposed solution

A short description of what you'd like Secure Edge to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

## Privacy and security impact

- Does this change introduce any new on-device persistence?
- Does it cause any data — even aggregated counters — to leave the
  device?
- Does it introduce a new dependency? If yes, name it.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, references to similar features in other
products, etc.
